long_description:
NRE were alerted of link flaps between ngas04.sr02.tok04 Et5/21/1 <-> ngcs083.2.sr02.tok04 Et19/1. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19685
short_description: ngas04.sr02.tok04 Et5/21/1 <-> ngcs083.2.sr02.tok04 Et19/1 | Link Flap
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via one-touch automation.)
